literals.刷新 QuickShell 和 Waybar 的主题配色: Refresh the QuickShell and Waybar color schemes
literals.控制 QuickShell 组件的颜色模式: Controls the color mode of QuickShell components
literals.控制状态栏的颜色模式: Controls the color mode of the status bar
literals.方向键选择 | Enter 应用 | Tab 切换 | Esc 关闭: Arrow Keys Select | Enter Apply | Tab Switch | Esc Close
literals.模式在下次设置壁纸时生效: The mode takes effect the next time a wallpaper is set
literals.点击下方按钮可立刻刷新所有组件主题: Use the button below to refresh all component themes now
literals.点击切换模式 | Tab 切换 | Esc 关闭: Click to Change Mode | Tab Switch | Esc Close
